top_signals.title: Oil Steadies as Peace Talks Continue, Hormuz Traffic Recovers
top_signals.summary: Oil steadied after the biggest quarterly drop since the pandemic as traders monitored peace talks between the US and Iran and the return of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: South32 sells nearly all its aluminum business to Alcoa for $5.6B
top_signals.summary: The sale, says South32, allows the company to slim down its business to focus on the "high-margin copper, zinc, silver and lead operations".
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Koryx Copper wins analyst support after Namibia assays
top_signals.summary: The updated resource supports a larger operation, BMO mining analyst says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Micron CEO: Customers driving hard bargain on price contributed to memory shortage
top_signals.summary: Micron CEO Sanjay Mehrotra said years of aggressive pricing pressure left the memory industry underinvested, contributing to today's supply shortages.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump says Council of Economic Advisers head Pierre Yared is leaving
top_signals.summary: The Council of Economic Advisers has provided the president with information and advice on both domestic and international economic policy since 1946.
